Our Story

Where Goa
Comes to Eat

Tucked into Bairro Forta Vaddo in Nerul, Casa do Leão is part neighbourhood haunt, part destination restaurant. We make handcrafted pizzas, comforting plates, and refreshing drinks — in a garden that stays open whatever the sky decides to do.

The name means lion in Portuguese, and Goa's Lusophone past runs right through the bones of this place. Come for the food. Stay for the feeling.

🌿
Garden Dining

Eat under open skies in our lush outdoor garden — with covered seating when the monsoon rolls in.

🛝
Kids' Play Area

A sandpit and trampoline keep the little ones happy while you enjoy your meal in peace.

🎵
Live Music & Good Energy

Good music, good company, and zero pretension. Casa do Leão has the energy of a place that's still discovering what it can be — and you're welcome in that story.

What We Make

From Our
Kitchen & Bar

Fresh, generous portions — made with care, not corners cut.

🍕
Wood-fired Pizzas

The soul of Casa do Leão. Thin-crust pies baked in our wood-fired oven, loaded with quality ingredients and made with intention.

House Specialty
🍝
Pasta

Comforting and generous. From a classic pesto to something more adventurous — every bowl made from scratch.

Crowd Favourite
🥟
Darjeeling Momos

A signature detour — delicate dumplings with hill-station roots. An unexpected highlight guests keep coming back for.

Must Try
🥖
Paninis

Pressed, golden, and stacked with flavour. The paninis at Casa do Leão have quietly earned their own devoted following.

Fan Favourite
🌱
Vegan Options

Including our showstopper — a Vegan Chocolate, Coconut Cream & Dates Pie. You will not miss the dairy.

Plant-Based
🍹
Drinks & Bar

Refreshing cocktails, soft drinks, and a full bar menu that pairs effortlessly with every plate we serve.

Full Bar

What Guests Say

One Verdict

★★★★★

"This place is such a little gem! The pizzas are absolutely delicious, the pasta is amazing, and the paninis are honestly to die for. Everything feels fresh, comforting, and made with so much love."

Deepika Verma
3 months ago · 9 reviews
★★★★★

"Casa do Leão is a lovely spot if you're looking for a change of environment and a calmer vibe. The garden dining setup makes it feel very relaxed and refreshing, and the space has a really positive energy."

Sachi Morajkar
3 months ago · Local Guide · 59 reviews
★★★★★

"Seriously good food, top notch service. The place and people have lots of character. Cozy vibe, friendly staff, and delicious food with generous portions. The Vegan Chocolate Pie alone is worth the trip."
